title: SQLancer crash on delete query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id UInt32, value Int32, description String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table(value, description) VALUES (1, 'First entry'), (NULL, 'Second entry'), (3, NULL), (4, 'Fourth entry');
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE (value IS NULL) OR (value IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL));
CREATE TABLE related_table(ref_id UInt32, extra_info String);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
key_bug_features: Delete query with complex condition on NULL values
